text: For summer and hot weather we recommend breathable, quick-drying pieces: the Aster Vent Tech Tee, the Aster Momentum Short, the Aster Studio Sports Bra, and the Aster Flow Legging. Add the Aster Daytrip Belt Bag for hands-free days out.

For winter and cold weather we recommend layering: the Aster Trailhead Puffer for warmth, the Aster Storm Shell Jacket over it when wet, the Aster Base Merino Long Sleeve underneath, and the Aster Peak Beanie. The Aster Cloud Hoodie is a cozy mid-layer.
For spring and fall, a light layering kit works best: the Aster Cloud Hoodie, the Aster Base Merino Long Sleeve, the Aster Everywhere Jogger, and the Aster Storm Shell Jacket for rain.

Gift ideas for her: the Aster Flow Legging (a compressive high-rise legging, 98 dollars), the Aster Studio Sports Bra (58 dollars), the Aster Cloud Hoodie (a soft oversized hoodie, 118 dollars), and the Aster Daytrip Belt Bag (38 dollars). For summer, pair the Flow Legging with the Vent Tech Tee and the Studio Sports Bra.
Gift ideas for him: the Aster Meridian Long Sleeve (60 dollars), the Aster Meridian Jogger (128 dollars), the Aster Base Shell (224 dollars), and the unisex Aster Peak Beanie (38 dollars).
Gifts under 50 dollars: the Aster Peak Beanie (38 dollars) and the Aster Daytrip Belt Bag (38 dollars). Aster gift cards are also available from 25 to 250 dollars.
For running we recommend the Aster Vent Tech Tee, the Aster Momentum Short with its secure zip pocket, and the Aster Studio Sports Bra for high-impact support.
For the gym and HIIT we recommend the Aster Studio Sports Bra for high support, the Aster Flow Legging for squat-proof coverage, and the Aster Vent Tech Tee to stay cool.
For hot yoga we recommend the Aster Vent Tech Tee, the Aster Studio Sports Bra, and the Aster Flow Legging, which are breathable, supportive, and stay put through inversions.

For travel we recommend a one-bag capsule: the Aster Base Merino Long Sleeve (regulates temperature over several wears), the Aster Everywhere Jogger (wrinkle resistant), the Aster Storm Shell Jacket (packs into its pocket), and the Aster Commute Tote with a padded laptop sleeve.
For a work commute we recommend the Aster Everywhere Jogger, the Aster Commute Tote for a laptop, and the Aster Storm Shell Jacket for rainy mornings.

Dressing for Toronto: winters are cold and snowy, so layer the Aster Trailhead Puffer, the Aster Base Merino Long Sleeve, and the Aster Peak Beanie, adding the Aster Storm Shell Jacket for slush. Summers are warm and humid, so the Aster Vent Tech Tee and Aster Momentum Short keep you cool. Toronto delivery from our Vancouver warehouse takes about 5 to 7 business days.

Dressing for Calgary: cold and dry with sudden temperature swings, so the Aster Trailhead Puffer, the Aster Base Merino Long Sleeve, and the Aster Peak Beanie work well, with the Aster Cloud Hoodie as a mid-layer. Calgary delivery takes about 3 to 4 business days.
Dressing for Montreal: cold, snowy winters call for the Aster Trailhead Puffer, the Aster Base Merino Long Sleeve, and the Aster Peak Beanie. Montreal delivery takes about 5 to 7 business days.

This shopping assistant and the Aster Athletics demo were designed and built by Aaron, also known as Hooman, Esteki, as a demonstration of an agentic retrieval-augmented generation platform with a knowledge graph. You can learn more about the developer at esteki.ca.
The Aster assistant speaks both English and French. Feel free to ask your question in either language and it will answer in kind. Oui, vous pouvez poser vos questions en francais.

Yes, you can talk to a human. Our support team is available by chat and email seven days a week, from 8am to 8pm Eastern. If you would like to speak with a person, or if the assistant cannot resolve your issue, it will connect you with a human specialist who follows up by email within one business day.
For casual and lounge days we recommend the Aster Cloud Hoodie, the Aster Everywhere Jogger, and the Aster Base Merino Long Sleeve for an easy, soft outfit.

Dressing for New York: hot, humid summers call for the breathable Aster Vent Tech Tee, the Aster Momentum Short, and the Aster Studio Sports Bra, while cold, snowy winters call for the Aster Trailhead Puffer, the Aster Base Merino Long Sleeve, the Aster Storm Shell Jacket for slush, and the Aster Peak Beanie. New York delivery from our Vancouver warehouse takes about 6 to 8 business days.

Gift ideas for your boyfriend or husband: the Aster Meridian Long Sleeve (60 dollars), the Aster Meridian Jogger (128 dollars), the Aster Coastal Hoodie (104 dollars), the Aster Base Shell (224 dollars), and the unisex Aster Peak Beanie (38 dollars). For a summer gift, the Aster Drift Tee and Aster Boreal Short are great picks.

Aster makes apparel and accessories for adult women and men. We do not currently offer a kids or children's line, and we do not carry maternity. Sizes run XS to XL, with one-size for bags and accessories.

Aster is our own brand, so we carry only Aster products. We do not sell other brands such as Nike, Lululemon, or Adidas. If you are comparing, the assistant can point you to the closest Aster equivalent.

Our bestsellers and most-loved pieces are the Aster Flow Legging, the Aster Storm Shell Jacket, the Aster Vent Tech Tee, the Aster Cloud Hoodie, and the Aster Studio Sports Bra. They are a safe bet if you are not sure where to start.
If you are not sure what size or style to gift, an Aster gift card is a great choice. Digital gift cards are available from 25 to 250 dollars, never expire, and are delivered by email.

Right now it is summer (early July). For summer we suggest breathable, quick-drying pieces like the Aster Vent Tech Tee, the Aster Momentum Short, and the Aster Studio Sports Bra. Lightweight layers are best while it is warm and humid.
First-time buyers get 15 percent off their first order when they join our free newsletter or Aster Circle membership. Just sign up at checkout and the discount applies automatically.
Sign up for the Aster newsletter for 15 percent off your first order, early access to new drops, and a heads-up before every sale.

Black Friday is our biggest sale of the year, at the end of November, with our deepest discounts across the store. Join Aster Circle or the newsletter to be notified first. We do not have a Black Friday sale running right now in July.
Our back-to-school event runs in late August and September with deals on everyday essentials like leggings, tees, and hoodies. Students always get 15 percent off year round, verified at checkout.

Current offers: free standard shipping over 150 dollars, 15 percent off for students and for healthcare workers and first responders, and 15 percent off your first order when you join the newsletter. We are not running a store-wide sale at the moment.

Trending now: lightweight packable rain shells like the Aster Storm Shell Jacket, neutral earth tones such as oatmeal, sand, and olive, and matching athleisure sets. A legging with a matching sports bra and a light tee is the go-to everyday look this season.

Popular colors this season are black, storm blue, oatmeal, and sand. For a polished, put-together athleisure look, pair the Aster Everywhere Jogger with the Base Merino Long Sleeve and layer the Storm Shell Jacket in a neutral tone.

For sensitive skin we recommend soft, non-itch natural fibers: the Aster Base Merino Long Sleeve is fine-gauge merino that resists itch, and our cotton-blend tees are gentle. Our performance fabrics are smooth and tag-light. Skip fabric softener, which can irritate skin and coat the fibers.

Texture guide: the Aster Cloud Hoodie has a soft brushed-fleece interior, the Aster Flow Legging is a smooth compressive four-way stretch, the Base Merino Long Sleeve is fine and lightweight, and the Storm Shell Jacket has a crisp waterproof shell. If you like buttery-soft, go for the Cloud Hoodie or the merino base layer.

Fabric content: leggings and many tops use recycled nylon and elastane for stretch, the Base Merino is fine merino wool, the Cloud Hoodie is brushed cotton-poly fleece, and the shells are recycled ripstop nylon with a waterproof membrane. Full fiber content is on each product page.
